creator: m.seaman@infracaninophile.co.uk
text:
From the announce message (http://lists.mysql.com/announce/459)

    MySQL Connector/J 5.0.6 a new version of the Type-IV all-Java JDBC
    driver for MySQL has been released.

    This is a bug fix release for the current production branch of
    Connector/J.

    Version 5.0.6 is suitable for use with any MySQL version including
    MySQL-4.1, MySQL-5.0, MySQL-5.1 beta or the MySQL-6.0 Falcon
    "Preview".

Changelog is at: http://dev.mysql.com/doc/refman/5.0/en/cj-news-5-0-6.html

Upgrading notes: http://dev.mysql.com/doc/refman/5.0/en/cj-upgrading.html
